subcodes.title: Lawh-i Shati’u’l-Baqa (Tablet of the Shore of Eternity)
subcodes.first_line: This is the Shore of Eternity; hearken unto that which is revealed from the Most Exalted Sanctuary: Verily, there is no God but Him. He hath created all contingent beings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا شاطی البقا فاستمع لما یوحی عن مکمن الاعلی انه لا اله الا هو قد خلق الممکنات
subcodes.subjects: @Moses, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @rejection of Muhammad
